title: [CI:DOCS] README.md: Add openssf passing badge
body:
Rebased on #2596 . Can remove it if we decide against it.

I guess similar procedure and concerns as https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/26087 .

comments.body:
The changes LGTM for what you want it to do.
I'll leave it to others to decide if we want the badges or not.  I'd vote in favor.
So, being explicit, this does not apply to vendored dependencies, only code specific to Skopeo proper.
